name: HATRED - Fake Builderman
description:

To think he was trapped in the Ghostwalker all this time, and all you had needed to do to save him and yourself, was wipe those negative feelings out your mind. It's a shame you didn't consider how it was all a hoax, for Hatred to fuck you into the void below!


❤️


I'm really sorry for no bots recently, infact this bot was in the drafts for three weeks bascially done, yet I never had released it. Okay. I'm a little stupid, but that's fine. I hope you all enjoy, really. I love you all, and thank you so much for the people who enjoy my bots. You all mean alot to me. I hopefully will give out more bots this week (maybe), errrr. I love Pursuer Die of Death, not much else to say this time around.
